themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "How do you evaluate decisions made from exhaustion versus those made from faith?". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶ֣רֶץ: into the land - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
